ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M for male, F for female) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete is affiliated with */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the athlete (e.g., Open, Master) */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Current weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in powerlifting */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Athlete's nationality */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the athlete */,
  "primary_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_primary_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_weight_class_kg FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_kg") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_kg")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_head_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizing entity */,
  "is_qualifier" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the competition is a qualifier */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the competition */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the competition's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., SBD, Squat, Bench, Deadlift) */,
  "best_3_squat_kg" REAL /* Best three combined squat lifts in kilograms */,
  "best_3_bench_kg" REAL /* Best three combined bench press lifts in kilograms */,
  "best_3_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best three combined deadlift lifts in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted in kilograms */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement in the competition */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Type of equipment used (e.g., Single-ply, Raw) */,
  "attempts_squat" TEXT /* JSON array of all squat attempts */,
  "attempts_bench" TEXT /* JSON array of all bench press attempts */,
  "attempts_deadlift" TEXT /* JSON array of all deadlift attempts */,
  "time_of_completion" TEXT /* Time at which the athlete completed their lifts */,
  "judge_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of IDs of the judges for the event */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the athlete's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES events ("event_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_judge_ids FOREIGN KEY ("judge_ids") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_equipment FOREIGN KEY ("equipment") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., SBD, Squat, Bench, Deadlift) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "min_weight_kg" REAL /* Minimum weight class allowed for the event */,
  "max_weight_kg" REAL /* Maximum weight class allowed for the event */,
  "rules_url" TEXT /* URL to the rules and regulations for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., Single-ply, Raw) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the equipment is custom-made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class_kg" REAL /* Weight class in kilograms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight class */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the weight class */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the weight class */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the weight class is open to all ages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Open, Master) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the division */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the division */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the division is open to all ages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the coach */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the judge */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizing entity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organizing entity */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the organizing entity's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)
